major-resources.headersHelper: bash -c 'TOKEN=$(major user token 2>/dev/null); ORG=$(major org id 2>/dev/null); echo "{\"Authorization\": \"Bearer $TOKEN\", \"x-major-org-id\": \"$ORG\"}"'

major-platform.headersHelper: bash -c 'TOKEN=$(major user token 2>/dev/null); ORG=$(major org id 2>/dev/null); echo "{\"Authorization\": \"Bearer $TOKEN\", \"x-major-org-id\": \"$ORG\"}"'
